name: components/search
description: An autocomplete search input with a dropdown of filterable results, optimized for query-heavy interfaces. Provides a complete composition system with Search, SearchIcon, SearchInput, SearchClearButton, SearchListbox, SearchNoResult, SearchSection, SearchItem, SearchItemLabel, SearchItemDescription, SearchItemIndicator, and SearchPortal. Supports type-ahead filtering, clear-button reset, grouped sections, no-result states, and full keyboard navigation. Built on Kobalte Search with ARIA combobox semantics.
useCases: Global site search bars in headers that suggest pages, articles, and products
User-directory lookups for assigning tasks, mentioning colleagues, or adding team members
Product-catalog searches that filter SKUs, names, and categories in real time
Command or settings search within large applications to surface actions and preferences
usage: import { Search, SearchIcon, SearchInput, SearchClearButton, SearchListbox, SearchNoResult, SearchSection, SearchItem, SearchItemLabel, SearchItemDescription, SearchItemIndicator, SearchPortal } from "shadcn-solid-components/components/search"
